title: Ripple config
description: Configures the Ripple GitHub Action. Place this file at .ripple.yml in your repository root.

paths.description: Map of micromatch glob patterns to owner GitHub handle(s). Patterns are evaluated in order; the first match wins. Handles must not include the @ prefix.

ai-review.description: Optional LLM-powered code review. Posts findings as a PR comment via any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

enabled.description: Set to true to enable AI Review on PRs.

api-url.description: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible endpoint without /v1 (e.g. https://api.openai.com, http://localhost:11434 for Ollama). Trailing /v1 is stripped automatically.

model.description: Model name to use (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-opus-4-7, llama3).

focus.description: Comma-separated review focus areas: logical-errors, error-handling, security, broken-assumptions, all.

skip-patterns.description: Comma-separated micromatch glob patterns for files to skip before any LLM call (e.g. '**/*.lock,**/generated/**').

skip-label.description: If this label is on the PR, skip AI Review entirely.

min-file-diff-lines.description: Skip files with fewer changed lines than this threshold.

min-pr-diff-lines.description: Skip the entire PR if total changed lines are below this threshold.

max-file-tokens.description: Truncate a single file diff at this many characters before sending to the LLM.

timeout-seconds.description: Per-file LLM call timeout in seconds.

allow-private-networks.description: Allow api-url to point at private IP ranges. Required for Ollama or vLLM on a private LAN runner.

post-as-comment.description: Post the review as a PR comment. Set to false to log to stdout only (useful for debugging).
